summary: The raddest party of the year.

Dance the night away to a totally excellent set list by the bodacious DJ Libre. Dress to impress in your 80's best and you could get crowned 2024 King + Queen!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Wicked Peach at Yellow Kittens

author: Austin Crawford
title: Miguel Dakota at Ballard's
summary: Get ready to be mesmerized by the incredible talent of Miguel Dakota at Ballard’s Beach Resort! As a finalist on Season 9 of America’s Got Talent, Miguel Dakota brings his electrifying vocals and captivating stage presence to our stage for an unforgettable performance. Join us for an evening of sensational music, soulful melodies, and unforgettable moments as Miguel Dakota takes the spotlight at Ballard’s. Don’t miss this opportunity to experience the magic of live music with one of America’s most talented artists!
content: Get ready to be mesmerized by the incredible talent of Miguel Dakota at Ballard’s Beach Resort! As a finalist on Season 9 of America’s Got Talent, Miguel Dakota brings his electrifying vocals and captivating stage presence to our stage for an unforgettable performance. Join us for an evening of sensational music, soulful melodies, and unforgettable moments as Miguel Dakota takes the spotlight at Ballard’s. Don’t miss this opportunity to experience the magic of live music with one of America’s most talented artists!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Jimmy Buffett Tribute: Parrots of the Caribbean at Ballard's
summary: Escape to the tropics with Parrots of the Caribbean at Ballard’s Beach Resort! Get ready to sway to the rhythm of the islands as this talented Jimmy Buffett tribute band takes you on a musical journey to paradise. With their authentic sound and infectious energy, Parrots of the Caribbean will transport you to Margaritaville for a day of island vibes and laid-back melodies. Don’t miss your chance to experience the ultimate tropical getaway right here at Ballard’s with Parrots of the Caribbean!
content: Escape to the tropics with Parrots of the Caribbean at Ballard’s Beach Resort! Get ready to sway to the rhythm of the islands as this talented Jimmy Buffett tribute band takes you on a musical journey to paradise. With their authentic sound and infectious energy, Parrots of the Caribbean will transport you to Margaritaville for a day of island vibes and laid-back melodies. Don’t miss your chance to experience the ultimate tropical getaway right here at Ballard’s with Parrots of the Caribbean!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Andy’s Way Bird Walk
summary: A bird walk for all skill levels. Bring binoculars and wear shoes that can get wet. Time changes weekly depending on the tide.
content:
A bird walk for all skill levels. Bring binoculars and wear shoes that can get wet. Time changes weekly depending on the tide.

 

Meet in Andy's Way Parking Area

Advance sign-up recommended but not required, Email kim.gaffett@tnc.org

 

Programs are weather dependent
address: Andy's Way New Shoreham Washington County
